items.headline: Flyers Vladar game time decision for in Game 4 of playoffs against Penguins
items.description:

items.headline: Los Angeles Kings desperate to find spark with backs against wall
items.description:
LOS ANGELES – As the Los Angeles Kings prepared for Game 3 of the Western Conference First Round, D.J. Smith said they earned a little puck luck.

items.headline: Carolina Hurricanes play to identity in Game 3 win over Senators
items.description:
OTTAWA -- The party was on at Canadian Tire Centre on Thursday.
The locals were amped, sent into a towel-waving frenzy after a national anthem set from the legendary Lyndon Slewidge.
But, it wasn’t enough to propel the Ottawa Senators back into their Eastern Conference First Round series against the

items.headline: Colorado Avalanche Los Angeles Kings Game 3 recap April 23, 2026
items.description: LOS ANGELES -- The Colorado Avalanche pushed the Los Angeles Kings to the brink with a 4-2 win in Game 3 of the Western Conference First Round at Crypto.com Arena on Thursday.

items.headline: Will Ferrell Chad Smith attend Los Angeles Kings Game 3
items.description:
Will Ferrell and Chad Smith were giving fans double vision on Thursday.
The comic actor and the Red Hot Chili Peppers drummer cheered on the Los Angeles Kings in Game 3 of the Western Conference First Round against the Colorado Avalanche at Crypto.com Arena.

items.headline: Carolina Hurricanes Ottawa Senators Game 3 recap April 23 2026
items.description: OTTAWA -- Logan Stankoven opened the scoring for the third straight game for the Carolina Hurricanes, who took a 3-0 series lead against the Ottawa Senators with a 2-1 win in Game 3 of the Eastern Conference First Round at Canadian Tire Centre on Thursday.​

items.headline: Buffalo Sabres Boston Bruins Game 3 recap April 23 2026
items.description: BOSTON -- Alex Tuch scored the go-ahead goal early in the third period for the Buffalo Sabres, who defeated the Boston Bruins 3-1 in Game 3 of the Eastern Conference First Round at TD Garden on Thursday.

items.headline: Alex Lyon steps in gives Buffalo Sabres big lift in Game 3 win

items.headline: Wyatt Johnston thriving on power play for Dallas in postseason
items.description: ST. items.headline: Ottawa Senators Jake Sanderson leaves Game 3 with injury
items.description:
OTTAWA -- Jake Sanderson left in the second period for the Ottawa Senators in a 2-1 loss to the Carolina Hurricanes in Game 3 of the Eastern Conference First Round at Canadian Tire Centre on Thursday.
Sanderson, Ottawa's top defenseman, was hit in the head by Hurricanes forward Taylor Hall
